name: mempenny
description: Memory hygiene for any AI coding agent. Tidy the auto-memory directory: drop stale, archive historical, distill verbose, organize into a fixed topic set. Backup-first, always reversible.

interface.longDescription: Tidy your agent's memory directory: drop the stale, archive the historical, distill the verbose, keep the rest in a small fixed topic set. Backup-first, reversible.
